data.title: test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh: getcwd fails after temp dir deletion in CI
data.description: CI Script Tests failure. 6 tests fail with 'shell-init: error retrieving current directory: getcwd: cannot access parent directories: No such file or directory'. The test creates temp directories, cd's into them, then deletes them — causing a stale CWD. This is a test infrastructure issue where the test doesn't cd back before cleanup.
